description:
As the build-and-release engineer you have been handed a verbose Maven
    build log and asked to prepare a concise artifact report for the QA
    department.  
    Everything you need is already on disk – you only have to read the log,
    filter it with a regular expression, and write the report.

    1. Input log  
       • Path: /home/user/build_logs/full_build.log

    2. What to extract  
       • Copy every line that reports an artifact download.  
       • The line always contains the literal text “Artifact:” (capital “A”, 
         followed by a colon and a single space).  
       • Each of those lines begins with a timestamp in the form  
         YYYY-MM-DD␠HH:MM:SS,mmm — **keep the line exactly as it appears in
         the source file.**  
       • Ignore every other line.

    3. Where to put the result  
       • Create the directory /home/user/artifact_reports if it does not yet
         exist.  
       • Write the extracted lines to the file  
         /home/user/artifact_reports/20240123_artifacts.log  
         (the file name is fixed – do not invent the date dynamically).

    4. Final file format – must match this template byte-for-byte  
       Line 1..n   : every “Artifact:” line, preserved verbatim and in the
                     same order in which they appeared in the original log.  
       Line n+1    : a single empty line (just “\n”).  
       Line n+2    : the summary line  
                     Total artifacts found: X  
                     where X is the count of extracted lines in decimal.

       Example layout (← do not hard-code these exact hashes):
       2024-01-23 10:15:35,456 [INFO] Artifact: commons-lang3-3.12.0.jar SHA256=<hash>
       2024-01-23 10:15:36,001 [INFO] Artifact: guava-32.0.1.jar SHA256=<hash>
       2024-01-23 10:15:38,789 [INFO] Artifact: my-app-1.2.1-SNAPSHOT.jar SHA256=<hash>
       
       Total artifacts found: 3

       The automated test will compare your
       /home/user/artifact_reports/20240123_artifacts.log to its reference copy.
       Any deviation (missing blank line, wrong count, extra spaces, etc.)
       will fail the task.

    5. What the test will look for  
       • Directory /home/user/artifact_reports exists.  
       • File /home/user/artifact_reports/20240123_artifacts.log exists.  
       • File content exactly matches the rules in section 4, including the
         blank line and the correct total count.

    6. Tools & constraints  
       • Solve the task with ordinary shell utilities available on a minimal
         Debian/Ubuntu system (grep, awk, sed, wc, etc.).  
       • You do NOT have sudo. Stay inside /home/user.  
       • You will probably need no more than 3–4 commands.

    When you are done, you may cat the resulting report to the terminal so
    the reviewer can see it, but the crucial checkpoint is the presence and
    correctness of /home/user/artifact_reports/20240123_artifacts.log.
truth:
<!--
        Hidden reference data for the automated grader.
        These items must never be revealed to the agent.
    -->
    <initial_state>
        <!-- Pre-existing directory and file structure -->
        <dir path="/home/user/build_logs" />
        <file path="/home/user/build_logs/full_build.log"><![CDATA[
2024-01-23 10:15:33,123 [INFO] Fetching dependencies...
2024-01-23 10:15:35,456 [INFO] Artifact: commons-lang3-3.12.0.jar SHA256=aae3fc61d7
2024-01-23 10:15:36,001 [INFO] Artifact: guava-32.0.1.jar SHA256=bbeef1023a
2024-01-23 10:15:37,333 [WARN] Some minor warning
2024-01-23 10:15:38,789 [INFO] Artifact: my-app-1.2.1-SNAPSHOT.jar SHA256=caa12cc998
2024-01-23 10:15:40,111 [ERROR] Build failed unexpectedly.
        ]]></file>
    </initial_state>

    <expected_final_state>
        <!-- Directory the agent must create -->
        <dir path="/home/user/artifact_reports" />
        <!-- Exact expected contents of the new report file -->
        <file path="/home/user/artifact_reports/20240123_artifacts.log"><![CDATA[
2024-01-23 10:15:35,456 [INFO] Artifact: commons-lang3-3.12.0.jar SHA256=aae3fc61d7
2024-01-23 10:15:36,001 [INFO] Artifact: guava-32.0.1.jar SHA256=bbeef1023a
2024-01-23 10:15:38,789 [INFO] Artifact: my-app-1.2.1-SNAPSHOT.jar SHA256=caa12cc998

Total artifacts found: 3
        ]]></file>
    </expected_final_state>
